items.title: Declan Rice gives update on injury after England star seen with ice pack on hamstring after World Cup win over DR Congo
items.summary: DECLAN RICE insisted he felt “as good as gold” despite looking exhausted in the energy-sapping heat against DR Congo. items.title: Belgium 3 Senegal 2: Red Devils win World Cup tie with last-minute penalty after VAR drama as they fight from 2-0 down
items.summary: YOURI TIELEMANS struck a dramatic and controversial extra-time penalty for Belgium to completely break Senegal hearts. items.title: Arsenal star Leandro Trossard in furious row with Belgium team-mate as Romelu Lukaku forced to step in
items.summary: LEANDRO TROSSARD was involved in a furious row with his own teammate during Belgium's dramatic World Cup clash with Senegal. items.summary: ENGLAND boss Thomas Tuchel hailed assistant coach Anthony Barry for inspiring England's comeback against DR Congo. items.title: Tielemans & Trossard go from heated row to rescuing Belgium
items.summary: Belgium's Leandro Trossard and Youri Tielemans go from arguing with each other during the hydration break to combining to get a crucial equalising goal against Senegal in Seattle.

items.title: Tielemans’ controversial late penalty caps Belgium comeback over Senegal

items.title: England fans face JAIL and nearly £10,000 fines for bringing common item into Mexico for World Cup clash
items.summary: ENGLAND fans could face jail and a huge fine if they bring a common item into Mexico with them. items.summary: JOE HART was brutally brought back down to Earth after being told he won't be heading to Mexico for England's World Cup last 16 tie. items.title: No time for England to adapt to altitude - Tuchel
items.summary: Mexico will have a "huge advantage" against England in the World Cup last-16 tie because of the altitude of the Azteca Stadium in Mexico City, says head coach Thomas Tuchel.

items.title: 'Why not take advantage?' - did hydration breaks spark England comeback?
items.summary: England came from behind to beat DR Congo and reach the last 16 of the World Cup, but did the momentum noticeably swing their way after the hydration breaks?

items.title: Tragic Maddy Cusack would still be alive if her girlfriend hadn’t moved away from Sheffield United, inquest told
items.summary: MADDY Cusack’s girlfriend moving away was the main reason for her decline in mental health, an inquest has heard.
